title: Subota
description: Subota is a horror mod that brings terrifying desktop-level events, jumpscares, and loud sounds to your Minecraft world.
body:
![Subota](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/810104135b5137d4221f8de2ac41a359bd53bd95.png)
Please read the Description

### Welcome to the first official release of the **Subota** mod!

## ⚠️ Important Note Before Playing ⚠️


Subota **may contain bugs**, **balancing issues**, and **other errors**. **Your feedback is crucial for development!**

### Multiplayer is not yet supported the mod will break right now

This is a **"jumpscare"** and **horror** mod. It may affect your gameplay experience in unexpected ways.

### Subota will:
> - read your desktop **username** and your Minecraft **name**
> - trigger **jumpscares** and **loud sounds**
> - **create a Fake Log File** upon starting the game, a **new file called subota-renderer.log.** **The subota-renderer.log file is designed to enhance immersion and SCARE YOU** by **displaying real data.** Rest assured, while information like your **IP addresses, OS name, OS version, OS arch and username is visible in this file, it remains entirely on your computer. There is no data collection or transmission of this information. Your privacy is not at risk.**
> - **close your game** unexpectedly
> - **shake your window**

## Found a Bug?
If you encounter any issues, **please report them in my [discord](https://discord.gg/5ahJsKw7Eb).**
Your help in making Subota **stable** and **fun** is greatly appreciated!
